change-password.heading: Change master password
change-password.description: Change your master password. The whole vault is re-encrypted under the new key. This can take several seconds to minutes depending on vault size. Do not close the window while the operation runs.

confirm.heading: Confirm
confirm.body: Change your master password now? Phylax re-encrypts your entire vault under the new key. The operation cannot be cancelled.

error.wrong-current: The current master password is not correct.
error.empty: New master password must not be empty.
error.too-short: New master password must be at least {{min}} characters long.
error.mismatch: New password and confirmation do not match.
error.same-as-current: New password must differ from the current one.
error.no-meta: Vault metadata not found. Please reload the app.
error.reencrypt-failed: Re-encryption failed: {{detail}}. Your master password was not changed.
error.partial-failure: Vault was re-encrypted, but the app could not activate the new key in this session. Please lock and unlock again with the new password.

auto-lock.heading: Auto-lock
auto-lock.description: Phylax locks automatically after this period of inactivity. The master key is wiped from memory and you have to re-enter your password.

export.heading: Export profile
export.description: Download your profile as a Markdown file. Bring it printed or as a file to your next doctor's visit.

danger-zone.heading: Danger zone
danger-zone.description: Permanently delete all Phylax data stored locally on this device. Profiles, observations, lab values, documents, AI configuration. No recovery path.
